channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Blind date in London: Ailsa and Mike share dinner but no romantic spark
item.description: Ailsa, a 31-year-old systems engineer, and Mike, a 35-year-old paralegal, met for a blind date dinner in London at Chargal in W1 as part of a social dating column. Both arrived early and initially not...

item.title: Clinton Ellison, Portapique mass shooting survivor, dies after long struggle with trauma and mental health impacts
item.description: Clinton Ellison, a survivor of the April 2020 mass shooting in Portapique, Nova Scotia, has died. According to his family, Ellison never recovered from the severe psychological trauma he experienced d...

item.title: Trump proposes to replace canceled state fair performers with himself
item.description: Amid widespread cancellations from performers due to the Great American State Fair's association with President Donald Trump, the president suggested he could personally step in as a replacement. Acco...

item.title: V&A South Kensington launches exhibition celebrating the UK’s lost music venues
item.description: The Victoria and Albert Museum (V&A) in South Kensington has opened a new exhibition titled ‘Lost Music Venues’, dedicated to celebrating the UK’s historic but now-closed grassroots and club spaces. L...

item.title: Lagos strengthens monthly sanitation drive to boost health and economic growth
item.description: The Lagos State Government has restated its commitment to its monthly environmental sanitation exercise, describing it as a permanent part of the state’s urban management strategy aimed at building a ...

item.title: Forensic archaeology reveals and helps protect Namibian genocide burial sites
item.description: This article explores how forensic archaeology is being used to investigate, document and preserve the physical legacy of the Namibian genocide committed under German colonial rule between 1904 and 19...

item.title: TMC MP Abhishek Banerjee allegedly attacked during visit to Sonarpur in West Bengal
item.description: Trinamool Congress MP Abhishek Banerjee was allegedly attacked by a mob during a visit to Sonarpur in West Bengal on Saturday. He had gone to meet the family of a party worker, Sanju Karmakar, who was...

item.title: Montreal Victoire celebrate historic PWHL Walter Cup win with downtown fan festivities
item.description: The Montreal Victoire are celebrating a landmark achievement in women’s professional hockey after capturing the Walter Cup, marking the first time a Canadian team has won the PWHL championship. Follow...

item.title: Diane Carlson Evans, Army Nurse and Advocate for Military Women, Passes Away at 79
item.description: Diane Carlson Evans, a former Army nurse and tireless advocate for women in the military, has died at the age of 79 from a rare cancer linked to exposure to Agent Orange during her service. Evans was ...

item.title: Gospel star Eko Dydda ties the knot with Florence Light in stylish church wedding
item.description: Veteran Kenyan gospel artist Eko Dydda has formalised his union with Florence Light in a church ceremony at Christ Embassy Kenya HQ. The event showcased a celebratory mood as a wedding party gathered ...

item.title: Sabalenka to face Osaka in French Open last-16 as Gauff progresses ambitions continue
item.description: At the French Open in Paris, top seed Aryna Sabalenka and four-time Grand Slam champion Naomi Osaka have both advanced to set up a highly anticipated last-16 clash. Sabalenka secured her place in the ...

item.title: Kitale authorities probe death of farmhand after alleged negligent surgery at private facility
item.description: Police in Kitale, Trans Nzoia County, are investigating the death of Brian Simiyu, a farmhand who died following what relatives describe as a negligent and unauthorised surgical procedure at a private...

item.title: DA wins Ward 28 in Evaton, signalling shift in traditional ANC stronghold
item.description: DA leader and Cape Town mayor Geordin Hill-Lewis has celebrated the party’s historic by-election victory in Ward 28, Evaton, a township ward previously dominated by the ANC. DA candidate Maki Emily Ts...

item.title: Tanzania Strengthens Laws to Protect National Flag and Symbols
item.description: Tanzania authorities have warned the public strongly about respecting the national flag. Government officials said anyone who misuses or shows disrespect to the flag will face strict penalties, includ...

item.title: Independent Investigation Launched After Surrey Police Shooting in Local Park
item.description: An independent oversight agency in British Columbia is investigating an incident in which a man in his 20s was shot by police in a park in Surrey. Authorities have not disclosed the circumstances lead...

item.title: Kenya’s skincare boom faces affordability gap as counterfeit risks loom
item.description: Kenya’s skincare market has grown rapidly, driven by awareness, self-care culture, aesthetics, and wellness. Yet many Kenyans struggle to afford consistent, quality products, and counterfeit items rem...

item.title: How to enjoy cherry season with nine sweet and savory recipes
item.description: Cherry season in the United States is a short-lived but eagerly anticipated period that typically runs from late spring into summer, depending on region, climate conditions, and cherry variety. A rece...

item.title: Hannah Waddingham discusses career journey, Wicked casting rumors, new series Ride or Die, and Ted Lasso future
item.description: In this interview, Hannah Waddingham reflects on her long career in theater and television, her breakout moments, and her current projects. She recalls how early critical praise in a poorly reviewed s...

item.title: IMD issues severe thunderstorm warning across Delhi-NCR as emergency alerts are sent to residents
item.description: On Saturday evening, residents across Delhi-NCR received widespread emergency alerts on their mobile phones warning of severe weather conditions, causing phones to buzz with notifications titled ‘Extr...

item.title: Negi urges Eric to keep Rave’s briefcase closed in Kapamilya Deal Or No Deal episode
item.description: Sa isang episode ng “Kapamilya Deal Or No Deal,” naging sentro ng tensyon at aliwan ang pakiusap ni Negi kay Eric na huwag buksan ang briefcase na hawak ni Rave. Ang naturang eksena ay nagbigay ng dag...
